name: Hot Roll Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir together to distribute evenly.
3. Place the mixture in a large, airtight container.
4. Label with the date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 6 to 8 months.
7. Makes about 22 cups of Hot Roll Mix.
